contexts.name: Guided Product Tour
contexts.description: Interactive guided tour overlay (Athena companion, spotlight, captions, audio/voice narration) that walks first-time visitors through the marketing site.

contexts.name: Conversion: Get Started, FAQ & Footer
contexts.description: Bottom-of-funnel conversion surfaces: get-started step walkthrough with visuals, download CTA, FAQ accordion, primary CTA button, and the site footer.

contexts.name: Why Agents & Use Cases
contexts.description: Persuasion sections: agent-vs-workflow scenario duels, the use-case agent-army grid with tool selection, and customer testimonials.

contexts.name: Features Overview & Pricing
contexts.description: Features overview page plus the value-proposition vision grid and pricing tier cards that explain what the platform offers and what it costs.

contexts.name: Homepage & Hero
contexts.description: Public homepage entry point: animated hero, command-center illustration, stat row, social proof, and lazy-loaded section orchestration.

contexts.name: Observability Deck & Security Vault
contexts.description: Feature sections for the live observability pulse-grid deck and the security vault pillars, plus shared cinematic backdrop helpers.

contexts.name: Agent Lab & Plugin Ecosystem
contexts.description: The Agent Lab (arena/chat/eval/evolution tabs) and the plugin ecosystem grid (dev tools, artists, research lifecycle, second brain graph).

contexts.name: Memory Layers & Multi-Provider AI
contexts.description: Showcase sections for the geological memory-layer stack, multi-provider AI routing, and the design-engine intent matrix.

contexts.name: Self-Healing & Trigger Automation
contexts.description: Animated explainer sections for the self-healing circuit (failure->recovery cycle) and the trigger-system wheel that fires automations.

contexts.name: Section Preview & Demo Harness
contexts.description: Internal preview/demo harness routes that render individual sections in isolation via a section registry, plus the demo and todo scratch pages.

contexts.name: Visual Flow Composer & Playground Page
contexts.description: The interactive visual flow composer (node cards, wires, event-queue bar, tool sidebar) and the standalone /playground page with its terminal simulation.

contexts.name: Orchestration & Platform Visualizers
contexts.description: Architecture-explainer demos: orchestration hub graph, animated event-bus showcase, platform layer stack, and a terminal/CLI command sequence.

contexts.name: Split & Pipeline Playground
contexts.description: Split-view playground (prompt editor + agent mind panel + flow nodes) and a pipeline-timeline simulation of staged orchestration.

contexts.name: Agent Execution Timeline Race
contexts.description: Animated multi-agent execution timeline that races agents through steps with a track view, race timer, and comparison results.

contexts.name: Agent Playground & Multi-Agent Chat
contexts.description: Marketing demos that simulate live agent interaction: a playground terminal form and a multi-agent chat race with typing indicators and comparison summaries.

contexts.name: Localized Guide Content (14 locales)
contexts.description: Hand-translated guide content (topics + per-module articles) for all 13 non-English locales, mirroring the English guide-data shape.

contexts.name: Guide Data, Content & Search Index
contexts.description: English source-of-truth guide content (categories, topics, per-module content) plus the search index, link, and localization-lookup utilities.

contexts.name: Guide Content Blocks & Markdown
contexts.description: The guide markdown renderer and its rich content blocks (callouts, code-compare, step wizards, architecture diagrams, keyboard grids, tabs).

contexts.name: Guide Pages & Navigation
contexts.description: The documentation guide hub: category and topic routes, sidebar navigation, reading progress, table-of-contents, related topics, and the search combobox.

contexts.name: How It Works & Changelog
contexts.description: The how-it-works explainer page plus the changelog/release-notes timeline section and its data.

contexts.name: Legal & Policy
contexts.description: Legal hub rendering privacy policy, terms of service, and cookie policy with a policy changelog.

contexts.name: Security & Compliance
contexts.description: Security/compliance page: pillar grid, compliance rows, an architecture data-flow diagram, and a security FAQ.

contexts.name: Blog
contexts.description: Public blog: index with featured post and category filter, slug-based article pages with byline/cross-links, and an RSS feed route.

contexts.name: Server-Side Vote Persistence
contexts.description: Server primitives backing the voting endpoints: IP rate limiting, a file-locked JSON store, and a cross-process file lock for vote idempotency.

contexts.name: Waitlist & App Download
contexts.description: Email waitlist signup modal and the desktop-app download artifact endpoint, plus the navbar download modal.

contexts.name: Feature Voting & Comments
contexts.description: Anonymous feature voting, boosting, comment threads, and custom feature-request submission, backed by vote/request/comment/boost API routes.

contexts.name: Public Roadmap
contexts.description: Public roadmap page reading roadmap_items / shipped_features from Supabase plus static phase data, rendered as area cards with progress.

contexts.name: Templates Gallery & Detail
contexts.description: Template gallery (category tiles + cards) and id-based template detail pages with YAML highlighting, configuration, and download CTA.

contexts.name: Connector Detail Modal
contexts.description: Per-connector detail modal showing capabilities, a terminal simulator, copy buttons, a try-it toggle, and setup CTA.

contexts.name: Connectors Catalog
contexts.description: Integration/connector catalog page with category sidebar, filters, connector cards, and the extend-your-own card, backed by the tool catalogue.

contexts.name: Messages & Settings
contexts.description: Dashboard messages thread list/detail with pagination, plus user settings (model providers, notifications, toggles).

contexts.name: Knowledge Base
contexts.description: Knowledge-base surface: memory cards, a dense pattern table, and an interactive cluster graph with detail panels.

contexts.name: Manual Review Queue
contexts.description: Manual review queue with focus-flow and split-pane modes, batch approve/reject with progress + undo toasts, keyboard shortcuts, and voice annotation.

contexts.name: Agents (Personas) Management
contexts.description: Dashboard agent/persona list and detail drawer (detail, subscriptions, memory actions, metrics) with optimistic persona-store updates.

contexts.name: Execution History & Streaming
contexts.description: Execution history table with filters and a detail modal that streams individual execution logs via an SSE proxy; filters persist via a filter store.

contexts.name: Leaderboard & Rankings
contexts.description: Agent leaderboard: a top-3 podium with rank-dimension tabs (overall/reliability/speed/cost/quality) above a sortable table and a radar comparison card ranking persona performance.

contexts.name: Observability Charts & SLA
contexts.description: Performance, usage, and activity observability views (latency, cost, spend, exec charts, health panels, Athena usage + value rollup) plus SLA target/breach tracking and system health state.

contexts.name: Event Bus & Stream Monitoring
contexts.description: Live event-bus topology visualization, swimlanes, event list panel with filters/bulk-retry, and an event detail drawer fed by an SSE stream.

contexts.name: Dashboard Home Overview
contexts.description: Mission-Control dashboard home: greeting, fleet recommendation, 3-column cockpit (triage / vitals console / activity stream), status ticker, and the below-fold instruments bay (heatmap, top performers, traffic, routines, vault).

contexts.name: Incidents Inbox
contexts.description: Audit-log incidents across the fleet: KPI header (open/severity/source breakdown), persisted status/severity/source/persona filters, a group-by control (agent/severity/source/none) with collapsible sections, and a row-detail modal. New route /dashboard/incidents; demo-only.

contexts.name: System Health Panel
contexts.description: System Health Panel: runtime / services / resources / integrations status cards with status dots, a disk-usage gauge, and illustrative install/configure actions (demo no-ops to a toast). New route /dashboard/health; demo-only.

contexts.name: Mobile App Shell & Views
contexts.description: Dedicated mobile experience: the /m route shell (overview, alerts, messages, reviews) and mobile UI primitives (app bar, tab bar, sheets, stat cards).

contexts.name: Animation & Motion System
contexts.description: Ambient motion components (orbs, particles, parallax, topo background) and the animation hooks/contexts that gate GPU-intensive motion behind reduced-motion.

contexts.name: Shared UI Primitives & Illustrations
contexts.description: Reusable design primitives (brand cards, terminal panel, chips), glow/gradient cards, brand icons, and the SVG illustration library.

contexts.name: Dashboard Shell, Chrome & Realtime
contexts.description: Dashboard chrome shared across all dashboard routes: layout, sidebars, scope bar, mobile bottom nav, skeletons, error boundary, status badges, and realtime sync provider.

contexts.name: Layout, Navigation & Page Shell
contexts.description: Global app shell: root layout, error/loading/not-found boundaries, navbar (logo, mobile menu, routes), page shells, section wrappers, and cookie consent.

contexts.name: Build Config & E2E Tests
contexts.description: Build/runtime configuration (Next.js + Playwright config) and the Playwright end-to-end test specs.

contexts.name: Supabase Client
contexts.description: Optional anon-key-only Supabase client and the typed query helpers used by roadmap and voting (guarded so the app falls back to mocks when unconfigured).

contexts.name: SEO & Social Metadata
contexts.description: SEO and social plumbing: per-route OpenGraph image generators, the OG frame helper, sitemap, robots, manifest, and shared SEO metadata helpers.

contexts.name: Error Monitoring & Analytics
contexts.description: Sentry init across client/edge/server, instrumentation hook, PII-scrubbing pipeline, analytics + page-view tracking, and the admin-protected stats endpoint.

contexts.name: Orchestrator API Client & Mock Data
contexts.description: The orchestrator API client and fetch wrapper, dashboard query layer, request proxy, and the demo-mode mock API + mock dashboard data sources.

contexts.name: Authentication & User Session
contexts.description: Demo OAuth-style auth: mock provider, role selector, route guards (AuthGuard/AuthLayout/SignInPrompt), auth store, and user-cache clearing on logout.

contexts.name: Shared Types, Utilities & Hooks
contexts.description: Cross-cutting shared code: domain types, validation, formatting/date/url helpers, scroll-lock, generic hooks, and server request/env utilities.

contexts.name: Theme System
contexts.description: Multi-variant theme system: persisted theme store, init + switcher, brand color tokens, and the semantic color/typography token mappings.

contexts.name: Internationalization (14 locales)
contexts.description: 14-locale UI translation bundle with en.ts as the typed source-of-truth, the useTranslation hook, and the persisted locale store.

instructions: Context map for personas-web. Each group is a business domain (domain field); each context is a feature with its files (filePaths) + a technical category. Read this to learn which files belong to which feature BEFORE editing. When you change a context's files, update them here (or run Vibeman's refresh) to keep this fresh.
